summary:
There is no established link between rare variants in PPARG and type 1 diabetes according to the available evidence. Although PPARG relates to LADA treatment, it has not been associated with direct genetic risk for T1D. 

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences as required.)

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
